creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #2)
Well the report is for older versions.
In that time I have checked and couldn't reproduce the bug (that's why asked for more info).
Again that you pinged I rechecked. everything is fine as far as I checked.
I dunno if should mark it as "not a bug", "overcome by events", or "feedback timeout"
